content:
type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Added optional relevance_scores: Optional[Dict[str, float]] param to NDCG.compute. Implemented via a small relevance(docid) helper used for both DCG (per retrieved doc) and IDCG (ideal descending-sorted relevances over expected_ids, still using min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) as the ideal_length cutoff - I did not change that line since it wasn't part of my task). Missing expected_ids in the mapping default to 1.0. When relevance_scores is None, behavior is identical to before (binary 1.0/0.0). Ran llama-index-core/tests/evaluation/test_metrics.py - all 42 tests pass. Note: since ideal_length still uses min(...) rather than len(expected_ids), your idcg bugfix and my addition touch overlapping lines (the IDCG block) - happy to adjust if you want me to incorporate your len(expected_ids) fix into my version, just let me know.
